Class tadt.standard.SpecialInstants 

java.lang.Object
   |
   +----tadt.standard.SpecialInstants
public class SpecialInstants
extends Object
This static class has the Special Instant constants, e.g., BeginningOfTime. It is implemented as a constant Instant since it will not change value during its lifetime.

BeginningOfTime
EndOfTime
ZeroPoint

SpecialInstants()

BeginningOfTime 
  public final static Instant BeginningOfTime
EndOfTime 
  public final static Instant EndOfTime
ZeroPoint 
  public final static Instant ZeroPoint

SpecialInstants 
  public SpecialInstants()
